item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:write","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":false,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"The rendering encodes visible marks on a surface with word uptake, but not their criterial lasting persistence; add a persistence clause and change the self-flag to lossy until that content is rendered."}
